'''鈭歸-z-dh-t''' ('''shawazdhetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nanomachine|nanomachine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-z-dh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nanomachine|nanomachine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-z-dh-t
|-
! Lemma
| shawazdhetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwazdhetoko|thiwazdhetoko]] || [[word:jiwazdhetoko|jiwazdhetoko]] || [[word:shiwazdhetoko|shiwazdhetoko]] || [[word:kiwazdhetoko|kiwazdhetoko]]
|-
